Cognism Signatures, for more through your email signatures

EasySync allows you and your colleagues to use your assigned signatures and campaign banners from Cognism Signatures within your Gmail account. 

The benefits with EasySync are:  

➤ You can choose from multiple email signatures; not just one. 

➤ Use default signatures for “New Messages” and “Replies / Forwards”. 

➤ EasySync is a Chrome extension that can be easily installed by any employee or centrally by IT on all workstations. 

➤ If the admin makes changes to the signatures in Cognism Signatures, the customized signatures are immediately available for the Gmail user. 

➤ You can connect our platform and EasySync to your company's Google Workspace account. 
 

Experience the advantages of the EasySync integration! More information is available on our website.

Tabion limits the number of tabs you can see in a window.

When you exceed the limit and open a new tab, the oldest one is hidden from the screen and added to your personalized feed.

Your Feed remains constant even if you close Chrome or restart your computer.

This extension intends to check whether the x-frame headers plugin is already installed, enabled or disabled.

This extension intends to check whether the "x-frame headers" plugin is already installed.

If the plugin mentioned is not installed, this will allow the user to install "x-frame headers" by providing a hyperlink to the extension's home page.

Regardless of the installation status, it will store values in the local storage to provide webpages the installation status of the said extension.

Keys stored in the localstorage:
- isIframePluginInstalled: 'true' if the plugin is installed.
- isIframePluginEnabled: 'true' if the plugin is installed and enabled.

This plugin is intended to be used for the Qore Application:
https://qorenext-app.azurewebsites.net/
Remedia is a crowdsourcing platform designed to fight clickbate titles, fake news and false claims

Read the news without clickbait titles or provide your own!

Wouldn't it be fun to be able to replace clickbait titles served by news companies? Also, be able to share them with your friends?

This extension allows you to do that and much more:
* Reporting of suspicious articles that will be fact-checked by Remedia
* AI powered generation of alternate title that will substitute clickbait titles on webpages in real-time
* Dislike articles
* Read claim reviews about an article while reading it
* View claims made by individuals and trust ratings made by fact-checkers
* and much more

This extension can change the look of webpages if:
* one of the main features of this extension is to fight clickbait titles, if you or another user write an alternative title to a clickbait one, that title will be replaced. The original title will still be visible if you hover the icon
* all DOM elements that are modified will receive one or several circles/badges beside them. The circles notify the user that there is a modification or that there is more info about the article in the crowdsourcing platform Remedia

Remedia is a crowdsourcing social network designed to remediate news articles. 
By installing the Chrome extension you will be able to view all the data generated in the social network while just browsing the internet. If there is data available about a page, a person's profile, or a claim, the extension will warn you and make it available to you in real-time.
If you would like to create such content and make it available to other users feel free to join.
https://remedia.social

Instantly highlight MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hashes on any web page and seamlessly connect to Stairwell for deep file analysis.

Bring the power of Stairwell's threat hunting capabilities directly into your browser. With automatic MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hash highlighting on any web page — whether in blogs, threat reports, or web platforms — you gain instant visibility into potential threats. In just a couple of clicks, determine if a file exists within your Stairwell environment and leverage Stairwell's Run-to-Ground (RTG). Uncover deep file analysis, close sightings, and variants to gain the context you need to stay ahead of evolving threats.

Benefits:

• Enhance your security workflow with instant hash identification and search capabilities
• Quickly assess your exposure and know where you need to take decisive action within your environment
• Gain deeper insights through seamless integration with Stairwell's RTG, uncovering the full scope of any threat

PriceDog – Track Price Drops on Any Website
Get notified when the price drops on any product, on any website. Never miss a deal again with PriceDog!

🐶 Never Miss a Price Drop Again

PriceDog helps you save money by tracking prices across the web. Set alerts for products on any website and get notified the moment the price drops.



🔑 Key Features

🌍 Works Everywhere – Supports all major online stores and any product page
🔔 Instant Alerts – Get notified immediately when a price drops
🛠️ Easy to Use – One-click setup, clean and intuitive interface



🧑‍💻 How It Works

1. Install the Extension
2. Click dog icon on any product page
3. Receive Email Notifications when the price drops



💬 Why I Created PriceDog

“I built PriceDog because I kept missing price drops. Now I catch every deal without wasting hours checking prices manually.”
– Jan Kadlec, Creator



💰 Transparent Pricing

Paid plan: $0.07 per tracked product per month with usage-based billing.



🌐 International Support

PriceDog works globally, on virtually any website.

access to Wiseman's 360 eco-system of services from a provider’s web based
EMR. 360 Ribbon enables providers to have access to important actionable
patient information at the point of care in order to effectively perform in a
value-based contract.

============================================================
FEATURES

☆ Helps optimize your patients’ risk score and subsequent financial
opportunities – Active diagnoses must be documented each year

☆ Presents open quality gaps according to payer contract to assist you in
achieving highest quality score against your patients and avoid possible
penalties.

☆ Assist in scheduling and completing patient annual wellness visit with ease

☆ Shows complete patient utilization history in a compact view. This allows
you to review patient costs and utilization by other physician offices and facilities

☆ Allows patient referrals to other providers and organizations

============================================================
ABOUT

360 Ribbon by Wiseman Innovations, LLC is a free download available on
Chrome Web Store. It works with majority of web based EMRs. You must be a
registered user of Wiseman platform of services in order to use it. It opens as
a ribbon on top of EMR to provide above mentioned features. It does not alter
or restrict EMR functionality in any way. It can be minimized to show any
content that may be hidden by it.

360 Ribbon does not use any explicit permissions available to chrome
extensions. It only processes web pages that are specific to integrated web-based EMRs.

360 Ribbon can integrate with any web based EMR with minimum possible
turnaround time.

360 Ribbon is also available for desktop based EMRs as a window application.
You can contact Wiseman Innovations, LLC through wisemaninnovations.com
or email support@wisemani.com in order to use it.

Aflo - Automatic Flows for Browser Tabs
Aflo is a browser extension that automates workflows for browser tabs, enhancing productivity and organization.

Aflo: Intelligent Tab Automation, Redefining Browser Efficiency!

Still losing your way in that crowded, chaotic tab bar at the top of your browser? Aflo revolutionizes Chrome browsing by leveraging intelligent automation to deliver an unprecedented, efficient, and organized tab management experience!

1. Product Overview

Aflo is an innovative Chrome browser tab automation tool. It works silently to automatically organize your chaotic tabs, grouping them by domain and cleaning up inactive ones. With intelligent grouping, powerful organization tools, and instantly accessible features, Aflo is the ultimate assistant for enhancing your browsing efficiency, maintaining focus, and unleashing your browser's full potential.

2. Core Advantages (Why Aflo?)

a. Eliminate Visual Chaos, Browse with Focus:

Say goodbye to overcrowded tab bars! Aflo automatically organizes your tabs, keeping your workspace clean and structured without requiring you to manually sort them.
Clean and Refreshed Browsing Area: By grouping related tabs instantly, Aflo reduces clutter, allowing you to focus solely on your content and enjoy a pure browsing experience.
b. Intelligent Auto-Grouping for Structured Management:

Smart Categorization by Domain: Aflo's core advantage! The extension automatically groups multiple tabs from the same website into its domain-specific native Tab Group (e.g., all open Zhihu questions automatically go into the "Zhihu" group). Instantly organizes chaos and centralizes related resources.
Group Expand/Collapse: Easily expand group contents with a single click or collapse them to save space. Swiftly switch between projects or topics without mental effort to remember tab locations.
c. Pin Critical Information with One Click, Never Lose It:

Essential Tabs, Guarded: For your most crucial tabs (like admin interfaces, core reference materials, or to-do lists), use the "Pin tab" feature. Keep them permanently visible on the left side of your tab bar - ensuring they are never accidentally closed or lost.
d. Eliminate Tab Bloat with Scheduled Archiving:

Automated Tab Organization Magic: Set a "Scheduled Archiving" (auto-close) time. Aflo efficiently closes inactive "sleeping" tabs, clearing browser memory burden and boosting performance. No more worrying about background tab buildup.
Customizable Durations: Set archiving intervals (e.g., 1hr, 3hrs, 24hrs) according to your workflow and habits for personalized management.
e. Efficient Operations at Your Fingertips:

Quick Access: Easily manage your tabs through the extension popup.
Effortless URL Copy: No more hunting through menus. Instantly copy the current tab's URL directly from the Aflo popup with one click.
Innovative QR Preview: Need to quickly send an open webpage to your phone? Aflo offers one-click "Preview QR Code" functionality! Scan to get the link instantly - breaking device barriers with zero-delay transfer.

3. Core Feature Summary

Automated Tab Management: Hands-free organization running in the background
Auto-Grouping by Domain: Intelligent tab organization into website-specific groups
Group Expand/Collapse: Effortlessly control information density
Pin Essential Tabs: Ensure critical information never gets buried
Scheduled Archiving (Auto-Close): Automatically clear inactive tabs to optimize performance
One-Click URL Copy: Instant link copying for seamless sharing
Current Tab QR Preview: Swift mobile transfer for desktop webpages
Intuitive Interface: Clean design with logical operation flow

4. Who Needs Aflo?

Researchers/Academics: Ideal for managing numerous reference materials automatically
Information Gatherers/Content Creators: Efficiently organize source materials and inspiration without manual sorting
Project Managers & Developers: Automatically group related project docs and debug pages
Productivity Enthusiasts: Anyone tired of default browser tab chaos wanting workflow enhancement
Multitaskers & Heavy Tab Users: Essential for managing information overload with zero effort

5. Easy Installation & Usage

Search for "Aflo" in the Chrome Web Store
Click "Add to Chrome"
Click the Extensions icon (puzzle piece) in Chrome's top-right corner and Pin Aflo to your toolbar for easy access.
Once installed, your tabs will be automatically grouped by domain - start enjoying efficient management immediately!
Click the Aflo icon to access settings and quick actions (QR Code, Copy URL, etc.).

Don't know what your buyers search for? Try these keywords from Etsy's search bar! For your Etsy SEO titles & tags by BeeSpeedy.

If you use the famous Etsy search bar strategy
OR you are an exact-match enthusiast who drives in customers via word matching, 
then I am confident that you will love this tool.

Introducing BeeSpeedy 🐝 an alternative way to find keywords (+that buyers actually use)!

👀 1: Learn which keywords buyers search for and use them for a chance to rank higher;
🎯 2: Find relevant, long-tails within your niche without the headache of guessing which keywords to use;
🏆 3: Update tags & titles in a few minutes** without starting keyword research from scratch!

* The lookout time ranges between 1-10 minutes.

3. Go to a listing (yours/competitors/any) and press start! :)

A powerful multi-function reloader with keyboard shortcut support.

💻 Chrome Extension: Developer Productivity Enhancer
This extension was developed for Chrome extension developers with the primary goal of boosting workflow efficiency. It provides a functionality to batch-reload extensions installed in Developer Mode and their associated browser tabs, based on user-defined settings.

✨ Key Features and Functionality
This tool automates and streamlines the tedious reloading process in the development workflow through the following core features:

1. Automatic Detection and Listing of Developing Extensions
It automatically detects and displays a list of only the extensions currently under development.

It constantly syncs and updates the extension's name, icon, and enabled/disabled status.

Uninstalled extensions are automatically removed from the list, and newly added extensions are prepended to the top of the list.

2. Flexible Reload Execution
Users can select multiple target extensions from the popup UI and execute a batch-reload instantly.

Individual extensions can also be reloaded using a dedicated button provided for each item in the list.

3. Instant Execution via Shortcut Key
A customizable shortcut key allows for the immediate batch-reloading of extensions based on a previously selected and saved configuration.

4. Simultaneous Tab Reloading (Optional)
As an optional setting, it can execute a browser tab refresh simultaneously with the extension reload.

Users can choose to reload either "Active Tab Only" or "All Tabs" as the target.

5. Additional Utility
The header title provides a direct link to the Chrome Extension Management page (chrome://extensions).

🚀 Benefits for Users
Significantly reduces the number of manual reload operations required during the development cycle.

Shortens the time needed to verify code changes, helping maintain development focus.

Simplifies the switching between target extensions when working on multiple development projects simultaneously.

Install the Mamma Search Companion to sync your omnibar search settings with Mamma search bar. Free upgrade in the Chrome Store.

Are you already enjoying the benefits of the Mamma Chrome Extension? Well, here's some excellent news for you! By installing the Mamma Search Companion Extension, you can enhance your browsing experience even further.

This extension offers seamless synchronization between your Mamma search field settings and Omnibox search settings, enabling you to customize your Mamma Extension even further.

Moreover, studies have shown that alternative search engines can lead to a more diverse and unbiased search experience than relying solely on Google Search. So, by using Mamma, you can broaden your knowledge and perspectives on various topics by quickly switching search engines to compare and find new information about your requested topics.

Don't miss the opportunity to maximize your browsing experience with Mamma Search! 

☆☆ Key Features ☆☆
✓ Seamless synchronization between your Mamma search field settings and Omnibox search settings
✓ Quickly choose alternative search engines to use in your Omnibox

IMPORTANT: After installing Mamma, click the ‘Keep it’ button on the ‘Change back to Google’ notification. This will show your chosen images on each new tab as desired.  

☆☆ Privacy and Security ☆☆
Mamma takes your security and privacy very seriously. We can ensure that:
- Your information will never be sold to a third party.
- Our collected URL data will never be associated with you or your account.
- You can review our complete terms of service at www.mamma.com/terms and our privacy policy at www.mamma.com/privacy
- You can read more about us at www.mamma.com/about
